[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 110001111 6
1 110001111 6
2 101111001 6
3 001110011 5
4 100011001 4
5 001000110 3
6 010011000 3
7 101001101 5

70 07 110011000 4

13 31 101001101 5 match 7
